query:
INSERT INTO room_summary_members (
                room_id, user_id, display_name, avatar_url, membership, is_hero,
                last_active_ts, updated_ts, created_ts
            )
            VALUES ($1, $2, $3, $4, 'join', false, $5, $5, $5)
            ON CONFLICT (room_id, user_id) DO NOTHING
